findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name List regex calls in Django core validators and URL handling
 * @description Enumerate regex usages in key validator and URL modules to support manual ReDoS assessment.
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity note
 * @id py/django-list-regex-validators-and-urls
 * @tags security
 *       regex
 */

import python

/** Identify calls to re.compile or re.* functions. */
class RegexCall extends Call {
  RegexCall() {
    exists(Expr func, Attribute attr, Name obj |
      this.getFunc() = func and
      func = attr and
      attr.getObject() = obj and
      obj.getId() = "re" and
      (
        attr.getAttr() = "compile" or
        attr.getAttr() = "match" or
        attr.getAttr() = "search" or
        attr.getAttr() = "fullmatch" or
        attr.getAttr() = "findall" or
        attr.getAttr() = "finditer" or
        attr.getAttr() = "sub" or
        attr.getAttr() = "subn" or
        attr.getAttr() = "split"
      )
    )
  }

  Expr getPatternArg() { result = this.getArg(0) }
}

predicate isValidatorOrUrlFile(File f) {
  f.getRelativePath() = "django/core/validators.py" or
  f.getRelativePath() = "django/contrib/auth/validators.py" or
  f.getRelativePath() = "django/contrib/postgres/validators.py" or
  f.getRelativePath() = "django/urls/resolvers.py" or
  f.getRelativePath() = "django/urls/base.py" or
  f.getRelativePath() = "django/urls/conf.py"
}

from RegexCall c, File f
where
  f = c.getLocation().getFile() and
  isValidatorOrUrlFile(f)
select c, "Regex call in validator/URL module: " + f.getRelativePath()
findings.hypothesis: Map all regex usage in Django core validators and URL modules as a basis for ReDoS-focused review.

message.text: Regex call in validator/URL module: django/urls/resolvers.py
Regex call in validator/URL module: django/urls/resolvers.py
Regex call in validator/URL module: django/urls/resolvers.py
Regex call in validator/URL module: django/urls/resolvers.py
Regex call in validator/URL module: django/core/validators.py

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name List regex calls in Django validators and URL handling
 * @description Enumerate all calls to re.compile and other re.* functions in core validators and URL resolver modules for manual inspection of ReDoS risk.
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity note
 * @id py/django-list-regex-validators-and-urls
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-1333
 *       external/cwe/cwe-400
 */

import python

/** Identify calls to re.compile or re.* functions in the standard library re module. */
class RegexCall extends Call {
  RegexCall() {
    exists(Attribute attr |
      this.getFunc() = attr and
      attr.getObject() instanceof Name and
      attr.getObject().(Name).getId() = "re" and
      (
        attr.getAttr() = "compile" or
        attr.getAttr() in [
          "match", "search", "fullmatch", "findall", "finditer", "sub", "subn", "split"
        ]
      )
    )
  }
}

/** Limit to Django core validator and URL-related modules. */
predicate isValidatorOrUrlFile(File f) {
  f.getRelativePath() = "django/core/validators.py" or
  f.getRelativePath() = "django/contrib/auth/validators.py" or
  f.getRelativePath() = "django/contrib/postgres/validators.py" or
  f.getRelativePath() = "django/urls/resolvers.py" or
  f.getRelativePath() = "django/urls/base.py" or
  f.getRelativePath() = "django/urls/conf.py"
}

from RegexCall c, File f
where
  f = c.getLocation().getFile() and
  isValidatorOrUrlFile(f)
select c, "Regex call in validator/URL module: " + f.getRelativePath()
findings.hypothesis: Inventory of regex usage in Django validators and URL handling to support ReDoS analysis.
